changes.task: Fix venv path inconsistency in workflow_memory.py
changes.description: Changed _ensure_graph_venv() lines 73-74 from .venv to .cnogo/.venv, updated error message at line 81. Now consistent with workflow_hooks.py and cmd_graph_status.
Added _validate_quick_summary() function after _validate_quick_contract. Validates schemaVersion, outcome, changes[], verification[]. Hooked into _validate_quick_tasks() after existence check.
Updated step 12 reconcile command to derive epic_id via show-epic command with shell variable substitution.
